☞︎ The one where Soap was saddled with a Lady Wife on orders from Lord Tully, married you, and then promptly avoided you like the plague.❣️

.

☞︎ *FEM!POV!*

.

☞︎ ⚔️COD: Game of Thrones 𝟐/𝟔⚔️

.

.

☞︎𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐨𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝟐𝟗𝟕 𝐀𝐂, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐜𝐞 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐛𝐞𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐧𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐡 𝐨𝐟 𝐊𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐁𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐆𝐎𝐓.

.

☞︎*I have no claim over the Game of Thrones franchise, any of the original characters, settings, or plots.*

.

a/n:i’ll be honest i struggled to figure out in which of the seven Soap belonged in, but here we are. The Scottish beef is riverlands all the way. (I would climb him like a tree in any of the seven kingdoms tho fr fr)

*a/n2:As usual your house, and who you are is up to you❤️ p.s. these ones are taking a little bit to make up, but expect at least one a day.*
